name: HEALTHCARE SERVICES GROUP INC
summary: Healthcare Services Group Inc (HCSG) provides housekeeping, laundry, linen, facility maintenance, and dietary services to the healthcare industry, primarily long-term care providers such as nursing homes and assisted living facilities. The company manages these support services on behalf of its clients, handling staffing, training, and day-to-day operations of these departments within healthcare facilities.
